holdings.n: First American Government Obligations Fund Class X

overview.description: The IncomeSTKd 1x Bitcoin & 1x Gold Premium ETF (ISBG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is actively managed, combining exposure to bitcoin and gold through derivatives while targeting a beta of 1.0. The fund uses leverage to stack the total return of its bitcoin holdings with the potential returns of the gold strategy ISBG was launched on Jan 20, 2026 and is issued by IncomeSTKd.
